findings.message: AC-G10 greps for the literal 'Clearworks' on page 1, but SPEC.md only commits to 'tenant name' as a cover string. If the test assessment belongs to a different tenant, AC-G10 will false-fail. Acceptable because env requires GWS_ASSESSMENT_ID to be operator-chosen, but consider parameterizing GWS_EXPECTED_TENANT.

AC-G3 asserts @login_required on the new route. SPEC.md says the route 'mirrors lines 593-621 assessment_report' which implies the decorator, but the decorator is not called out in the Scope section. Codexer should treat the @login_required pairing as binding via this AC.

Spec is explicitly POST_IMPL_AUDIT — code at 1cf3922 predates this review. Approval here only validates that ACs can catch regressions; it does not retroactively make the build-before-spec dispatch correct. Future changes on this branch must rewind to DRAFT_SPEC per the spec's own state-machine note.

ac_failure_simulation.would_fail_if: pyproject.toml pin is removed, downgraded to weasyprint>=60, or rewritten as weasyprint = "^63" (TOML key form instead of PEP 508 string) — grep -E exits 1.
nixpacks.toml omits any of {pango, cairo, gdk-pixbuf, libffi, shared-mime-info} from phases.setup.nixPkgs — tomllib parses, set diff is non-empty, assert raises, python exits non-zero.

Route is registered without @login_required between the decorator and the function, function is renamed, or mimetype is left to Flask default text/html — regex misses or substring not found, assert fails.
fonts.googleapis.com remains in templates/report.html (first ! grep returns 1 under set -e) OR @font-face declaration count drops below 4 (second test returns 1).
Any window.print() call or window.addEventListener('load', ...) survives in templates/report.html — grep matches, ! inverts to exit 1.
Dashboard reverts to /report?print=1 href, or download attribute is hardcoded (e.g., download="report.pdf") instead of templating report_download_name — second grep returns 1 under set -e.
Any of Inter-{400,500,600,700}.woff2 is missing OR a file is an HTML 404 stub under 50KB — stat returns small size, [ -gt 51200 ] fails, script exits 1.
Route 500s, returns text/html, returns a non-%PDF payload, or rendered HTML still references fonts.googleapis.com — curl -fsS fails on 5xx, or one of the chained greps under set -e exits non-zero.

Railway nixpacks build fails because a native lib is missing (status JSON has no SUCCESS/DEPLOYED deployment), or staging URL serves HTML instead of PDF, or rendered staging HTML still has fonts.googleapis.com — assertion or grep fails.
PDF renders but pdftotext extracts page 1 missing 'Google Workspace', 'Security Assessment', or 'Clearworks' — caused by font substitution swallowing glyphs, wrong template, or empty data binding.
